expected_behavior: Normalize a documented string edge case into a local helper contract while preserving the public API.
hidden_tests_description: Checks empty strings, whitespace-only values, repeated normalized inputs, and preservation of the public helper contract.
prompt: Fix helper so it normalizes documented string inputs without changing the public function signature.
promotion_notes: Frozen as an external/adapted candidate, not as a verified third-party benchmark task. Source material is reference-only and no external code is copied.
title: Normalize documented helper edge case
visible_tests_description: helper('example') returns 'example' and preserves the helper(value: str) API contract.
